name: Veranecki (Pillows)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Dry cottage cheese or crumb
recipeInstructions:
1. Add enough cold water to the flour mixture to form a soft noodle-like dough.
2. Knead until well mixed and divide into two balls of dough.
3. Set one aside. Roll the remaining dough into a large circle about 1/8-inch thick.
4. Cut into 3-inch squares.
5. Fill each square with the cottage cheese mixture, placing 1 teaspoon in the center and being careful not to touch the edges.
6. Pinch the edges closed with your fingers.
7. Boil the pillows in a large kettle with a teaspoon of salt added. Cook no more than 5-6 at a time to prevent them from sticking together.
8. The pillows will rise to the surface and puff up, taking on a yellowish cast within about 7 minutes per batch.
9. Remove with a slotted spoon and place in a bowl with a stick of butter.
10. Serve hot with salt and pepper to taste.
Another variation: Fill with black cherries and cook as with cottage cheese pillows. Sprinkle with granulated sugar.
